formats.notes: This FDD covers the License Program only. Operator franchises are offered under a separate FDD. Licensed Units are non-traditional locations (universities, hospitals, airports, businesses). Two License Agreement forms exist.

development_structure.value: No area development agreement. Single-unit licenses granted individually at CFA's discretion. CFA may grant additional Licensed Sites under the same License Agreement without requiring a new agreement, or may require a separate then-current agreement and initial license fee.

initial_franchise_fee.description: Chick-fil-A does not charge an initial license payment or fee to obtain a Chick-fil-A license.

opening_inventory_if_cfa_supply.notes: Not due until after Licensed Unit opens. Only if CFA Supply is your distributor.

license_fee.due: Monthly by the 25th for preceding month

audit_penalty.extra: If understatement >= 5%, licensee pays all CFA audit costs

late_payment.rate: 12% per annum on amounts 30+ days overdue

advertising_fee.notes: No advertising fees or fund contributions required

supplier_control_economics.proprietary_seasoning: CFA owns; shipped to approved poultry suppliers who apply it
supplier_control_economics.proprietary_seasoned_coater: CFA sells to distributor(s) who resell to licensees
supplier_control_economics.proprietary_lemon_juice: Bay Center (affiliate) produces; sold via distributor(s)
supplier_control_economics.cfa_supply_sole_distributor: May be the only approved primary distributor in geographic area
supplier_control_economics.alternative_supplier_process: Case-by-case; CFA reserves right to be sole supplier for trade secret items

components.name: Virtual Licensee Training
components.location: Via Zoom from Atlanta Support Center
components.for: Dedicated Chick-fil-A Leader and Additional Chick-fil-A Leader

training_burden.ongoing_requirement: At least 2 management-level employees per site must be certified at all times

tech_burden.pos_requirement: Licensee must obtain and use a POS system and management PC. CFA does not currently require specific equipment but reserves the right.
tech_burden.data_reporting: CFA may require POS data transmission via approved vendor data reporting systems in the future.
tech_burden.loyalty_programs: CFA reserves right to require participation in gift card, loyalty, and affinity programs.

territory_structure.protection_scope: During License Term, CFA will not operate or license another unit from the same Site where licensee operates. No geographic, campus, or area exclusivity.
territory_structure.encroachment_note: Legal protection is minimal (same-site only, non-exclusive license), but practical encroachment risk is moderated by the captive-venue model — a university food court CFA does not directly compete with a nearby free-standing Operator restaurant.

initial_term.value: Specified per individual agreement (blank in template)

renewal.value: CFA has the right but not the obligation to renew. No automatic renewal right.

transfer.value: No transfer without CFA's prior written approval. CFA has right but not obligation to approve.

termination_curable.value: Breach of material duties, damage to goodwill, failure to comply with hours, material impairment, loss of Licensed Site, failure to comply with government regulation, failure to comply with standards.

termination_non_curable.value: Material misrepresentations, felony conviction, conversion/embezzlement, gross receipts understatement 5%+ twice, insolvency/bankruptcy, operations frustrated by law/pandemic/epidemic/war/civil disorder/labor activity.

post_termination.value: Immediately change site to different use, pay all sums due, cease use of all trademarks/IP, return all manuals, obey non-compete.

during_term.restriction: No nationally or regionally branded chicken products or substantially similar products

post_term.scope: At the former Licensed Site only
post_term.restriction: No nationally or regionally branded chicken products or substantially similar products

noncompete.state_modifications: California: non-compete post-term may be unenforceable. Other states may modify.

cases.name: Stephens and Strawn v. Chick-fil-A (Data Breach)
cases.court: U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Georgia
cases.type: Data breach / PII compromise — Chick-fil-A One members (Dec 2022 - Feb 2023)
cases.claims: Negligence, breach of implied contract, negligence per se, Georgia Uniform Deceptive Trade Practices Act
cases.resolution: Settled individually (not class). $210,000 total ($2,500 per plaintiff x5, remainder to counsel). Dismissed with prejudice Dec 7, 2023.

cases.name: Mayheu / Pittman / Ukpere / Goldstein / Ortega v. Chick-fil-A (Delivery Fee)
cases.court: Superior Court of Fulton County, Georgia (consolidated)
cases.type: Delivery fee misrepresentation — higher delivery menu prices not disclosed
cases.claims: Negligent misrepresentation, violations of GA/NY/NJ/FL/CA consumer protection statutes
cases.resolution: Class action settlement approved Feb 29, 2024. $4,400,000 fund. $880K attorney fees, $15,579 costs, $5K per lead plaintiff, $29.25 per valid claimant (3,984 claims), ~$230K to Feeding America. No franchisees named.

litigation_summary.franchisee_involvement: No franchisees named as defendants in any disclosed litigation

bankruptcy_flag.description: Pier 1 Imports, Inc. filed Chapter 11 on February 17, 2020. Pier 1 is NOT the franchisor or an affiliate. Cheryl Bachelder (CFA Board member since April 2019) served as Interim CEO of Pier 1 Dec 2018-Nov 2019. Matter still pending.
bankruptcy_flag.court: U.S. Bankruptcy Court, Eastern District of Virginia

item18_public_figure_flag.description: Chick-fil-A does not use any public figure to promote its franchises.

item19_performance_summary.scope: 409 domestic Licensed Units open at least 1 full calendar year as of Dec 31, 2024
item19_performance_summary.excludes: Operator Restaurants and their annual sales volumes
item19_performance_summary.definition_of_annual_sales_volume: Entire gross receipts (excluding sales taxes) from all sales at, from or related to the Licensed Unit during the calendar year, whether cash or charge.

item21_auditor_financial_statement_summa.auditor_location: 1075 Peachtree Street NE Suite 2600, Atlanta, Georgia 30309
item21_auditor_financial_statement_summa.guaranty_structure: No standalone guaranty exhibit. No personal guaranty requirement identified for Licensed Unit program.

franchisee_list.status: partial — CID encoding on Licensed Unit pages

unresolveds.description: Exhibit E Licensed Unit pages (~189-200+) have CID font encoding. Individual Licensed Unit names, addresses, and contact information are unreadable.
unresolveds.impact: Cannot verify Licensed Unit count or contact individual Licensed Unit operators from the PDF.

unresolveds.description: License term is blank in the template License Agreement. Actual term is specified per individual agreement.
unresolveds.impact: Cannot confirm standard term length for Licensed Units.

unresolveds.description: Item 11 training schedule table referenced but not fully extracted as a structured table.

contradictions.description: Item 20 Table 1 shows 2023 Franchised Restaurants starting at 2,331 but Table 3 2023 totals show start of 2,331 — however Table 1 shows 2022 end at 2,338 and 2023 start at 2,331. The 7-unit discrepancy between 2022 end (2,338) and 2023 start (2,331) in Table 1 is likely due to counting methodology adjustments between fiscal years or the Totals line in Table 3 showing '2022' with data that reads like the 2023 line.
contradictions.resolution: The Table 3 Totals line for 2023 reads '2022 2331...' which appears to be a printing artifact or mis-labeling in the PDF extraction. The actual 2023 start figure is 2,331.

insurance_requirements.scope: Premises, operations, personal injury, products/completed operations, assumed liability
insurance_requirements.specific_limits: Not stated in template — per individual agreement

confidentiality_agreement.required_signers: All managers/supervisors in a Unit; FSP form also requires Third Party Operators and their personnel
confidentiality_agreement.scope: Operations manual, recipes, sales data, supplier lists, business plans

sales_reporting.daily: All product sales reports via CFA Licensee Sales Portal after closing
sales_reporting.monthly: Gross Receipts reports due by 5th of each month with POS-generated PDF
sales_reporting.license_fee_remittance: By mail or ACH, received by 25th of each month

franchisee_list_summary.decode_method: Type3 CID font glyph shape matching
franchisee_list_summary.quality: Readable with case normalization needed; some U+2019 character substitutions
